name: Different Color Transformation
description: Generic before/after pair with same full-body reference framing but a strong color/style change. No coverage assumption.

relations.name: color_brightness
positive: bright colorful saturated vivid clothing colors
negative: dark black muted monochrome clothing colors

pair_reranker.query: Choose the best before/after pair. Both images must be full-body standing and match the reference pose/camera. Prefer a strong visible outfit/color/style change. The color is allowed and encouraged to change. Reject cropped, lying, sitting, or low-quality images.
